query: DELETE FROM paperEquitySnapshots; DELETE FROM paperTrades; DELETE FROM paperPositions; UPDATE paperLedger SET availableCash = 100000, sessionId = 1 WHERE id = 1; DELETE FROM paperEnginelock; SELECT availableCash, sessionId FROM paperLedger WHERE id = 1;
